payload.input_str:
{'sql': 'SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cn.Model) AS model_count, cm.FullName AS maker_name
FROM car_names cn
JOIN car_makers cm ON cn.MakeId = cm.Id
GROUP BY cm.FullName;'}

inputs.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cn.Model) AS model_count, cm.FullName AS maker_name
FROM car_names cn
JOIN car_makers cm ON cn.MakeId = cm.Id
GROUP BY cm.FullName;

payload.result: content='{"ok": true, "row_count": 22, "columns": ["model_count", "maker_name"], "preview_rows": [[1, "American Motor Company"], [1, "BMW"], [1, "Chrysler"], [1, "Citroen"], [1, "Daimler Benz"]], "dtypes": {"model_count": "int", "maker_name": "str"}, "executed_sql": "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cn.Model) AS model_count, cm.FullName AS maker_name\\nFROM car_names cn\\nJOIN car_makers cm ON cn.MakeId = cm.Id\\nGROUP BY cm.FullName;"}' name='execute_sql' id='265dac51-dfa4-45fa-a3ea-fcb6cb038d2c' tool_call_id='gOrdGOx4m'

final.final_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cn.Model) AS model_count, cm.FullName AS maker_name
FROM car_names cn
JOIN car_makers cm ON cn.MakeId = cm.Id
GROUP BY cm.FullName;
final.answer_text: There are 22 car makers, each producing a distinct number of car models.
